full_text:
Cai Fang 蔡方
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Fang (蔡方). Rebel who killed Licheng county’s governor Xu Zhi. Cai Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
